en: Please indicate your company's business entity / form of business within Nepal.
Sole Proprietorship: A business owned and operated by a single individual
Partnership: A business owned by two or more individuals who share profits and losses
Private Limited Company (Pvt. Ltd.): A company with limited liability, owned by shareholders
Public Limited Company (Ltd.): A company with limited liability, whose shares are offered to the public
Limited Liability Company (LLC): A hybrid entity combining features of partnerships and corporations, providing limited liability to its owners
Cooperative: A business organization owned and operated by a group of individuals for their mutual benefit
Foreign entity with no local fiscal presence
